steps.expected: HTML page loads with sections for batch pricing, timestamp query, and token classification
steps.observed: Page loaded with h2 headings 'Single Token Price', 'Batch Token Pricing', and 'Token Classification', each containing form elements

steps.expected: Timestamp input element exists alongside block number
steps.observed: textbox 'Timestamp (optional)' with placeholder 'Unix epoch or ISO 8601' found in price form, placed side-by-side with Block Number input

assertions.title: Timestamp and block mutually exclusive in UI

steps.action: Type '1700000000' into timestamp input in price form
steps.observed: Block Number input gained [disabled] attribute, visually grayed out
Block Number input re-enabled (no disabled attribute)

steps.action: Type '18000000' into block input in price form
steps.observed: Timestamp input gained [disabled] attribute, visually grayed out

steps.expected: Multi-token input (textarea) and submit button present
steps.observed: textarea 'Token Addresses (comma-separated)' with placeholder showing two comma-separated addresses, and 'Get Prices' button found

assertions.title: Batch form has optional amounts field

steps.action: Inspect Batch Token Pricing section for amounts input
steps.observed: textbox 'Amounts (optional, comma-separated, matches token order)' with placeholder 'e.g. 1000,500' found in batch form

steps.expected: Token input and submit button present
steps.observed: h2 'Token Classification' section with textbox 'Token Address' (placeholder '0x...') and 'Check Bucket' button found

assertions.title: New params (skip_cache, ignore_pools, silent) in UI

steps.action: Inspect Single Token Price form for new parameter controls
steps.expected: Controls for skip_cache, ignore_pools, and silent exist
steps.observed: Found: checkbox 'Skip Cache', checkbox 'Silent', textbox 'Ignore Pools (optional, comma-separated addresses)' — all present in the price form

steps.action: Submit batch form with 'INVALID_ADDRESS' as token
steps.expected: Error message from server displayed in UI
steps.observed: Red error text 'Invalid token address at position 1: INVALID_ADDRESS' displayed in dark result area below batch form

steps.action: Submit check_bucket form with 'INVALID' as token
steps.expected: Error message from server displayed in UI
steps.observed: Red error text 'Invalid token address: INVALID' displayed in dark result area below classification form

evidence.consoleErrors: Expected 400 errors from intentional invalid requests: GET /ethereum/prices?tokens=INVALID_ADDRESS -> 400, GET /ethereum/check_bucket?token=INVALID -> 400

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. UI loads with all three new sections (single price with timestamp, batch pricing, token classification). Timestamp/block mutual exclusivity works bidirectionally via JavaScript disabled attribute. New params (skip_cache, ignore_pools, silent) have UI controls. Error messages from server render visibly in red for both batch and bucket endpoints.
